title: verbascum × tauricum
intro: Verbascum × tauricum, also known as Golden Guelder Rose or Russian Verbena, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids, coumarins, and iridoid glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × tauricum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, gastrointestinal issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × tauricum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
